name: Business Advantage Cash Rewards Mastercard
perks: 3% cash back in your chosen category (gas, office supply stores, travel, TV/telecom, business consulting, or computer services)
1% cash back on all other purchases
3% and 2% rates apply on combined purchases up to $50,000 per year
$300 statement credit after $3,000 in purchases in first 90 days
0% intro APR for 9 billing cycles on purchases
Preferred Rewards for Business members earn up to 75% more cash back
Free employee cards with spending limits
Year-end spending summary for tax preparation
drawbacks: $50,000 annual cap on combined 3% and 2% earnings (drops to 1% after)
Best rewards require Preferred Rewards for Business status (Bank of America relationship)
No travel benefits or purchase protections beyond basic
Chosen category can only be changed once per calendar month
